channel.title: SpliceKit Motion
channel.description: Most recent releases of SpliceKit Motion

item.title: SpliceKit Motion v1.0.2
item.description:
What's New in 1.0.2

Hardening release. 1,836-test harness revealed and fixed: Motion Project Browser suppressed (no more modal on launch); command palette async dispatch (no more bridge hangs on modal-opening selectors); broad blocklist for state-dependent crashy selectors (editMarker, shareToDefaultDestination, etc); Lua VM now initializes on Motion; Lua string handling hardened against invalid UTF-8 and runaway loops; null action params rejected cleanly.

item.title: SpliceKit Motion v1.0.1
item.description:
What's New in 1.0.1

Add Sparkle auto-update support. Future releases will be installable directly from the app's 'Check for Updates...' menu.
